title: New Horizons
description: Voxy and Iris together with other mods to make the generations look better.
body:
## **KEEP IN MIND THIS IS NOT A MODPACK FROM THE IRIS TEAM NOR DISTANT HORIZON TEAM, ONLY A FAN CREATION**

"New Horizon" offers an immersive Minecraft experience with Distant Horizon and Iris. Distant Horizon enhances distant views with LOD, while Iris introduces vibrant shaders while being extremely buggy. Explore new biomes, encounter challenging mobs, and embark on rewarding adventures in this captivating modpack.

Please note that not all shaders are compatible. Currently, in "New Horizon," "Bliss" is the most supported option, providing compatibility and optimal performance and that Distant Horizon and Iris uses both alpha version meaning that they are very buggy and may have bugs, please report them into the discord, this will help the future players and maybe even yourself.

Additionally, "New Horizon" requires a powerful PC to fully enjoy its immersive features. Due to the advanced rendering techniques and resource-intensive nature of Iris, a high-performance system is recommended for the best experience.

## **WARNING : SINCE DISTANT HORIZON AND IRIS ARE IN HIGHLY BETA VERSION YOUR WORLD CAN END UP BADLY, USE WITH PRECAUTION**

Includes [Bliss Shaders](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)
